reference: My son was playing soccer yesterday and collided with another player. He has a huge lump on his forehead. He woke up this morning and had some blood, both black and red, in his spit that he coughed up. He has a headache; the lump has gone down a bit but is still bruised. Should I be concerned about the other kid's stitches?
text: My son was playing soccer yesterday and collided with another player. He has a huge lump on his forehead. He woke up this morning and had some blood, both black and red, in his spit that he coughed up. He has a headache. The lump has gone down a bit, but he's still bruised.
